nasb.text: Then she came and told the man of God. And he said, “Go, sell the oil and pay your debt, and you and your sons can live on the rest.”

esv.text: She came and told the man of God, and he said, “Go, sell the oil and pay your debts, and you and your sons can live on the rest.”

cnv.text: 她去告訴神人，神人說：“你去把油賣掉，還清你的債務，你和你的兒子可以靠著剩下的過活。”

ccb.text: 妇人将经过告诉上帝的仆人，上帝的仆人对她说：“你去把油卖了还债，你们母子可以用剩下的钱度日。”
